title: antillanthus eriocarphus
intro: Antillanthus eriocarphus, also known as the 'Island Fleabane', is a flowering plant native to the Galapagos Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and terpenoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antillanthus eriocarphus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human consumption.
